items.summary: ENGLAND stars cool off in the pool ahead of the World Cup kick-off. items.title: Sullivan facing further scrutiny following investigation by BBC and The Times
items.summary: Billionaire businessman David Sullivan, who stepped down as chairman of West Ham on Saturday over allegations of improper conduct, is facing further scrutiny following a joint investigation by the BBC and The Times.

items.title: Somali referee dropped from World Cup after US visa denial
items.summary: Africa's top referee will not be allowed to officiate at the World Cup after he was refused entry to the USA, FIFA has confirmed.

items.title: Somali referee Artan to miss World Cup after being barred from entering US
items.summary: Omar Artan, who was set to be the first Somali to referee at the World Cup finals, is dropped from the list of officials after he was denied entry to the United States.
